tasks.name: Create Breadcrumbs component file
tasks.logs: [Plan] Created from goal plan (goal-1783488067210). Risk tier: GREEN

chatHistory.content:
Task created by Plan-from-Goal.
Goal: Add breadcrumb navigation to the sub-pages of this Next.js app so users can easily navigate back. Pages: project workspace src/app/[projectId]/page.tsx, task studio src/app/[projectId]/tasks/[taskId]/page.tsx, and agents page src/app/agents/page.tsx. Create one reusable Breadcrumbs component in src/app/loop-components/ (kebab or Pascal naming consistent with existing files), then integrate it on each page showing the trail e.g. Home > Project > Task. Include a unit test for the component.
Rationale: Establishes the foundation for the reusable breadcrumb navigation component.
Risk tier: GREEN. Safety nets: Basic unit test verification
